videos.title: Part 1, GFNY Cambridge: how the race unfolded and my strategy.
videos.transcript:
hello from Florida I want to give you a
recap of the race on Sunday this was the
gfny Cambridge Maryland race and it was
very flat It was 95 mil about and maybe
400 ft or less of elevation gain so this
is going to be a two-part series I'm
going to talk about the first half of
the race today and then check out
tomorrow's video for the second half of
the race and I use different strategies
a little bit for each part okay so I'm
going to walk you through
chronologically I was at the front of
the race I had number three lucky number
three and so that was a great spot
because basically I didn't have to make
up anytime I just had to maintain my
position so basically I just went with
the first people and I tried to stay up
with them at the start it was a very
fast start and I just wanted to be with
those first people just in case there
was a break which there ended up not
being one eventually everyone just kind
of grouped together and it became about
a hundred or more people just going down
the road so this was a very big group
and I was just kind of watching the
Dynamics unfold every so often there'd
be an attack off the front of a couple
people or even the group would split a
little bit but eventually it would
always come back together so I realized
that people at the front were strong
enough and willing to pull that it was
going to be very very hard for a break
to form also I was watching the women
the women were not going with any of the
breaks and I'm not racing the men I'm
racing the women so I just want to be
with them I didn't try to go with any of
the brakes because I concluded that
those brakes probably weren't going to
stick and if they did stick it's okay
because no women were there and so I was
just slotted into pretty much the middle
of this big group sometimes towards the
front and I didn't really care if I was
you know if I drifted back a bit
sometimes i' move up I didn't care if
the other women were in front of me
because for the first half of this race
it was just sit in and be comfortable
the name of the game was be patient no
actions happening just sit in and wait
till the second half of the race where
things might start happening and that's
where the video is going to pick up
tomorrow
